name: python3-aiosqlite
title: python3-aiosqlite
summary: sqlite library for Python 3 using asyncio
description:
sqlite library for Python 3 using asyncio
A Python 3 module for using sqlite with asyncio.  It allows interaction with
SQLite databases on the main asyncio event loop without blocking execution of
other coroutines while waiting for queries or data fetches.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aiosqlite because sqlite library for Python 3 using asyncio.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aiosqlite as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aiosqlite with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aiosqlite --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
